title: References to the division
doc_html:
§945.  References to the division

Any references to the division of small and emerging business development, or any of its previous titles, throughout the Louisiana Revised Statutes of 1950, shall mean the department.

Acts 2001, No. 9, §9, eff. July 1, 2001.
